reviews.review_description: This game has potential in the overall creativity and storyline. However, it glitches and crashes. I cannot continue the game to the next level. It crashes me to the meta main menu.  I requested a refund and was denied. A waste of $19.99. Either fix it, or give people back their money. Simple.

I got a few hours into this game and was very interested and impressed with the gameplay mechanics and the story. However, when trying to continue on to the next level, the game would glitch out and then crash. I closed the game, and then tried to load the levels again and the same thing happened. I even restarted the headset and that didn't help. Eventually, I wasn't even able to get the app to open at all and now can't play the game. I should have read the reviews before purchasing because a lot of people have complained of similar issues. It has been patched before so it is a shame that there are still issues. Since I had gotten more than 2 hours into the game, I cannot get a refund so I hope the game gets fixed soon.

I have yet yo barely make it past the very beginning yet, and though it seems ok I guess, there is one flaw that truly annoys me and makes me wirry about the OVERWHELMINY bad reviews on this title...
Though this issue was appearently "latched" it serms, no matter ehat I do I am THE SIZE OF A CHILD! My boundary settings are all correct (changing the floor level does NOTHING for some reason anyway) 
but the first guy you meet in the game, i literally only come up JUST above his stomach. And the Sitting position that helps with this in other games (not that it really ever hppens), THAT purs me 2 feet OVER him, making the game unplayable that way lest I sit low on my f****ng floor...

So now I'm truly worried about the MANY bugs and gamebreaking glitchs I've heard of, and though the devs claim to have patched all/ most of them months ago- THIS ossue was also supposed to be fixed!
Making me believe that this may just be a team that needs to work on something besides VR games if I continue to find more reasons to regret giving this very interesting game a chance even after the massively negative reviews and warnings...

I pray nothing more or worse comes up going forward...
So 2 Stars for now.

This game is amazing! 
The topics covered are of a complexity that is head and shoulders above the most famous flat titles. 
The gameplay is like nothing I've ever seen before. 
There are multiple endings and this is one of the few games that I wanted to replay to see another ending. 
Only flaw, some bugs, understandable given the structure and complexity of the game.

I have 1 question: did anyone try to make a second run? I tried but there are many bugs: in the 1st memory (Johanna appartment) when i push the button to switch to soggettive memory, i enter in the 13th years memory, at the school!

If you correct this bug and let me play a second run, i will give five stars!

Edit: After 4th reinstall I was finally able to put the mirror piece into my right wrist and now can't progress in the picture memory timeline with the new childhood memories, still no response from playme or raw fury...please fix the game so i can complete....please

After the wait the game is unplayable in its current state, I was excited to play this and 2 days later I have contacted the Devs and told them this is glitched out badly and can't progress at the mirror.....once this is fixed I will raise my rating if you like murder mystery story narratives which i do you will love this.....once it's playable!

developer_response.body:
Hi JenerationXnVR, 

Thank you for playing The Signifier and sharing your review with us. 

We're so sorry for the experience you've been having. We just release a patch with many fixes and improvements. We invite your to play it again hoping you may now enjoy the full experience. 

We're committed to improving the game, so please don't hesitate to let us know if you have any further comments or questions.

reviews.review_description: I gave this a three because it seems like it would be an interesting game.  Unfortunately I may never know. It's buggy. I restarted it once (stuck on a white screen), got through the mirror bug with help from another reviewer's post, and am now unable to grab a memory piece because it is just slightly out of reach. I really hope these issues are fixed sooner rather than later. I'm not interested in restarting again.

developer_response.body:
Hi SoapyDawn, 

Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We apologize for the issues you encountered while playing the game. We've recently released a patch addressing many of the reported bugs, including the ones you mentioned. We understand your frustration and hope you'll consider giving the game another chance now that these issues have been addressed. 🎮

Your feedback helps us improve, and we're committed to delivering a better experience for all players. If you have any further concerns, please feel free to reach out to us. Thank you for your patience and understanding. 😊

reviews.review_description: Just got it and love this kind of game suspense,  mystery superb graphics great story 👍 ty devs brillant . It's got a nice twilight zone vibe to it as u explore crazy dreams piecing a puzzle together,  super cool 😎

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! It means a lot to us. 😊

reviews.review_title: I want to love this game, but…
reviews.review_description: I have never left a poor review in my entire life, so it kind of breaks my heart to start now. Like the title says, I want to love this game… I REALLY do. Amazing premise. Amazing use of VR. Captivating story. But there are just too many bugs. I have had to restart twice already (so all 3 game slots are in use) and I will likely have to start over a third time if I want to continue. Every bug I hit has been progress stopping. Whether it be the complete loss of an avatar, the control panel not being available on my wrist, or the inability to release a time warp from my grip while being stuck in an endless “walking” effect. I know there was a patch released recently, but it doesn’t seem to have helped me at all since I did start over after patching. I will likely uninstall this game and keep an eye on it for additional patches, and then reinstall at that point. I just can’t start for a fourth time. Sorry for the negative review.

developer_response.body:
Hi DimeLes, 

Thank you for taking the time to share your honest feedback with us. 

We're truly sorry to hear about the issues you've encountered, and we appreciate you bringing them to our attention. Our team is actively working so last week we released a new patch addressing these issues. Please make sure to update to this new version. We also recommend starting a new game to avoid any potential issues. 

We hope this time you are able to fully experience the game. Thank you again for your patience and understanding!

reviews.review_description: Absolute rubbish don't waste your money . We can forgive bugs on a new game but this one's a joke . Absolutely terrible

developer_response.body:
Hi johnbhoy74, 

We're truly sorry to hear that your experience with the game was frustrasting. Rest assured, we take your feedback seriously, and we're fully committed to improving the game. In fact, we've just released a patch addressing many of the issues you've encountered, including the ones you mentioned. 

We sincerely hope you'll consider giving the game another chance to experience the improvements we've made. Your support and patience mean a lot to us as we strive to deliver a better gaming experience for everyone. Thank you very much!

reviews.review_description: Brilliant Idea, the idea of objective and subjective states, but lost the will to live going through the videos, first attempt, I got the clock puzzle and went between subjective and objective states, but trying to do the second one over by the sofa, I came back and the puzzle had disappeared before I'd placed it anywhere, meaning I couldn't put the piece in the mirror and couldn't progress. Reloaded, rewatched all the videos, reexamined the apartment, went to the simulation, note says sobjective stated added to wrist watch, and it was loading but not doing anything,  and I can't get out of it and go back as I've climbed the ladder through dressing room and it's a one way trip, so stuck, again! Spent hours going around and around and making same observations, but no progress as I can't change state at all this time! The idea for the game is really good, but the controls as they stand and the poor explanation and constant glitching and clunky movements, it's virtually impossible to get the puzzles sorted as it's so oversensitive, the watch is hit and miss and either does nothing or it's hard to press, the conversations and accuracy in the movements is pre-high school IT level bad, to the point that it's a refund from me, it's unplayable in it's current state, and watching the You tube video the developers point to in another person's report of the same glitch does NOT enable the watch to switch between subjective states, which is why so many people, like me, are trapped in the simulation having not been able to collect the info as it won't switch states and we can't end it until we have the info we need, which we can't get. I love the story idea, it's brilliant, but a really bad idea to put the game out in this state, with such a badly executed tutorial in the form of a series of videos in which nothing is actually demonstrated at all, and bears no relation to how the game play operates. As another reviewer said, it's insulting to put the game out in this state .

developer_response.body:
Hi helen_mulrooney, 

Thank you very much for your detailed feedback! 😊

We are truly sorry to hear that your experience was so underwhelming. 

We wanted to let you know that we have just released a patch that aims to fix most of the major issues reported. We invite you to give the game another chance, hoping that you may now enjoy the full experience. 👌

We take your feedback very seriously, so we look forward to your comments to keep improving the game.  🎮

reviews.review_title: Wanted so bad to rate higher... UPDATED
reviews.review_description:
Love the idea of the game, very interesting, different and I like the premise....but has definately been released too soon.... keep finding myself outside the play area in black void, falling endlessly through rooms only to find myself placed back to start falling again (looking up through the blackness I can see the room above moving away) .... movement controls are very buggy and hands get locked into position easily...what was once excitement playing the game is now frustration so am putting away. . I hope the devs work on this as would love to get back to enjoying

Updated : from 1 to 4 ......sooooo after a few days away I could not help myself but try again. The story is that good! Now don't get me wrong, the bugs were still there but the story was enough to keep me going.... and in a way this has now become one of my favourite games! Unexpected and thought-provoking ...can definately see me playing again. Hope they fix the bugs soon though.

developer_response.body:
Hi carriec83,

Thank you very much for your feedback! We are glad to say that we did keep working on the game and just released a patch that fixes most of the issues reported, which include those you mentioned related to navigation and falling to the void. We invite you to try the game again, hoping that you are now able to fully experience the story. Looking forward to your thoughts about it. Thank you! 😉

reviews.review_description:
I was enjoying the storyline but I've spent several hours on the puzzle with the four masks and no matter what I try, the masks do not seem to be turning towards what they should so the puzzle, for me, is unsolvable.

I'm going to give up and maybe come back at a later date to see if it's been addressed.

Until then, I'm going to rate this as a one star because it's unplayable for me.

Great game so far! Truly immersive and some scenes look really good for a Quest game. The concept is super different (and a bit creepy). Some people are complaining about a bug in the mirror, it is not a bug, you just have to bring the data to the other state by placing it in your wrist first, if you don't it won't travel with you (which isn't explained so well, but devs said they would make an update with a new tutorial message to make sure everyone got it). Really interesting stuff so far

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for taking the time to play The Signifier and leave a review. We really appreciate it :)

Indeed, we are preparing a fix for this particular issue. This update will also include some additional fixes and improvements. Please feel free to reach out on the Raw Fury Discord or the PlayMe Studios accounts and let us know how you're getting on :)

reviews.review_description:
Ever since I bought the game since day one I've never even been able to start it I hear reviews of it being a good game it would be nice to actually be able to play it so in this case I can't even give a star pretty s
ad

reviews.review_title: Ambitious, unique, with room to improve.
reviews.review_description:
I've played some of the original PC version before this VR port was announced, and both VR and flat versions aren't well known.
But I greatly respect them both for having interesting narratives, STRONGLY effective feel in creepiness and unease (especially in VR), and ambitious detective gameplay through closely observing your surroundings and using different states of mind, matter, and sound, to solve puzzles.

It's not a bad VR port either. And while it did launch a mess, they've been fixing a lot of problems, but it still has some work.
Remaining problems I've encountered so far:
- VERY low resolution for textures and texts. No doubt a Quest 2 limitation, but the Quest 3 version could use better textures, at least for the objects you pick up like books.
But texts that pop up like tutorials and subtitles are way too blurry.
- Low framerate hands. For some reason, my hands move at low framerate compared to everything else.
- Needs better sitting mode. When in standing mode, the height is fine. But it's wrong in sitting mode, as it puts me too high. The crouch button fixes this, but I still can't crouch low enough to pick up objects down low. And talking to NPCs feels either much shorter than them or much higher, for some reason.
I even tried to sit with the crouch button pressed, stood up, reset camera position holding meta button, and sit back down. Nothing changed. Sitting mode is just too high.

Echoing what DimeLes and another reviewer reported, The Signifier is a game I want to love, but the technical difficulties are very hard to overcome. This game is extremely immersive and a perfect genre for VR. Compelling story and trippy visuals. I can tell a lot of work has gone into this title. I'm giving a higher review because I believe that, eventually, it will be patched to the point that the glitches don't block progress and force restarting the game entirely, repeatedly. I managed to get to one ending after the last patch was released, so that was satisfying. I would love to experience the whole game again once it is error-free. I highly recommend it IF you are a patient person willing to work through the problems.

Perfect blend of mystery, science fiction, and some soft elements of psychological horror (I play hardcore stuff). It’s really great. I hope more games like this are added in the future. I highly recommend if you like games like this. I did get stuck a few times but that’s what the internet is for. 😆

developer_response.body:
Hi FeyLionheart222, 

We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the blend of mystery, science fiction, and psychological horror in The Signifier! Your recommendation means a lot to us. 

We just released a patch that addresses the major issues the game had, ensuring a smoother gameplay experience. We wanted to let you know in case you would like to try this update. 

Happy gaming! 😊🎮

reviews.review_description: Compelling story and interesting characters. The game is not too long so I’ll replay it to get some of the other endings
The game has potential but not ready for primerime!!!  Avoid it like the plague.  To top it off , my refund request was denied.

developer_response.body:
Hi jat1963,

We're truly sorry for the experience you had with our game. We wanted to let you know that we kpt working on the game and just release a patch that solves most of the issues reported. We encourage you to give the game another try and give us your opinion. 

Thank you for your patience and understanding.

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game. The only thing  is that I got like half way through the game, and then all of a sudden  I am falling through the floor and into just a black screen . I thought, "Oh well, I will just reload from an earlier point, but it continues to fall through the floors. So I am hoping that whatever it is gets fixed at some point and I can finish the game.  I have read other reviews, and I haven't seen one like my issues, so fingers crosses at some point I will finish it.

developer_response.body:
Hi kiekielala5, 

We're thrilled to hear that you absolutely loved our game! 😊

Thank you for your feedback and for bringing this issue to our attention. We're pleased to inform you that a patch addressing the falling issue and other major problems was just released. We recommend updating your game to the latest version. 

We appreciate your continued support and patience, and we hope you'll give the game another try. Happy gaming! 🎮✨
